description: VoiceStudio Plugin Catalog - Community and Official Plugins

categories.name: Voice Synthesis
categories.description: Plugins for synthesizing speech from text

categories.name: Speech Recognition
categories.description: Plugins for transcribing audio to text

categories.name: Audio Effects
categories.description: Plugins for applying effects and processing audio

categories.name: Voice Conversion
categories.description: Plugins for converting between voice identities

categories.name: Utilities
categories.description: General utility plugins for format conversion and tools

categories.name: Integrations
categories.description: Plugins for integrating with external services

categories.name: Developer Tools
categories.description: Plugins for plugin development and debugging

plugins.name: Noise Reduction
plugins.description: Reduce background noise from audio using spectral gating. Wraps the noisereduce library for high-quality stationary and non-stationary noise reduction.
plugins.author: VoiceStudio

versions.changelog: Initial release. Spectral gating noise reduction with configurable strength, stationary/non-stationary modes.

plugins.name: Audio Format Converter
plugins.description: Convert audio between formats (WAV, MP3, FLAC, OGG, AAC) using FFmpeg. Supports bitrate, sample rate, and channel configuration.
plugins.author: VoiceStudio

versions.changelog: Initial release. FFmpeg-based format conversion with configurable bitrate, sample rate, and channels.

plugins.name: Silence Detector
plugins.description: Detect and analyze silence regions in audio. Identifies pauses, gaps, and quiet segments with configurable thresholds.
plugins.author: VoiceStudio

versions.changelog: Initial release. Librosa-based silence detection with configurable dB threshold, minimum duration, and frame parameters.
